body: I’m thrilled to help my best friend Marc, who I’ve known since our UC Santa Cruz printmaking days, celebrate his new Upstate New York home! I gave him the ultimate housewarming gift—a Dabify outdoor refresh, all thanks to @CastleryUS! His modern home with its black backdrop was perfect for clean lines and warm wicker. We transformed three spaces: the enclosed patio with the modular Rio outdoor sofa for cozy naps, a landing spot with Lorna swivel chairs for morning coffee, and the backyard with the stunning Sorrento dining table amidst lush trees for alfresco dining. Working with Castlery was a dream. Their customer service is truly unmatched. Go check them out and get your outdoor spaces summer-ready!
